names.name: Xingren Caizhai GJX6+WC -- near Tianheng Gong

names.name: Xingren Jiulong Taizi Dian Five Generals
興仁九龍太子殿五營
Xingren Beitou Tianshu Gong Weiling Dian
興仁北斗天樞宮威靈殿

transliterations.transliteration: suè 次 king 辰 Liân 菊 Gue̍h Kiat tuànn
seoi3 ci3 gang1 san4 nin4 guk1 jyut6 gat1 daan3
suì cì gēng chén nián jú yuè jí dàn

trans.div: Sui Ci Geng Chen Year Ju Yue Jidan
